discover.title: Suggested entities ({count} found)
discover.description: Detected by sensor type (door/window, power draw) among your installed integrations. Pick the ones you want watched.

data.kind: Kind (binary = on/off sensor, power = power draw in W)
data.label: Name used in notifications
data.problem_state: State considered a problem (for kind binary)
data.threshold: Power threshold in W (for kind power)

set_map.title: Set up floor plan ({count} map cameras detected)
set_map.description: Pick your vacuum's map camera (if your integration exposes one) or upload a PNG of your floor plan.
